input: Hi, I was charged $79 on March 1st for a plan I downgraded from in February. I have the confirmation email. This is the third billing issue in 6 months. Please fix this and explain what is happening.
response: Dear Customer, thank you for reaching out. We have reviewed your account and confirmed the erroneous $79 charge following your February downgrade. A full refund has been initiated and will appear within 3–5 business days. We sincerely apologize for the repeated billing issues and are investigating the root cause. Customer Support.
